title: Pushing My AI Dark Factory to Its Limits with Opus + Kimi Combined
summary: Cole Medin describes combining Anthropic's Opus for deep reasoning and planning tasks with Kimi K2.6 for implementation and validation in his AI Dark Factory codebase. The approach routes tasks to models based on reasoning complexity requirements to maintain token efficiency while scaling.
